Global Issues, FCDO) to Michael Ellam (Second Permanent Secretary, European Union 
and International Economic Affairs, CO) and others
Subject: US/ trade

To: Michael Ellam 
, Varun Chandra

344

Subject:
Michael Ellam 
Fri 07/03/2025 9:50:22 PM (UTC)
Jonathan Black 
, Varun Chandra 
, Katy Budge1 
, Malte Werner 
, 
, Peter Mandelson 
, Mungo Woodifield 
PSMichaelEllam Mailbox 
Draft email to No10
All,
Apologies for the Friday night email, but we have been asked by No10 for some 
urgent advice tonight on what our options are over the weekend 
 Comments asap please.
Michael

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
